title: UN OUTIL PRATIQUE POUR ÉVALUER L'EFFICACITÉ DES BARRIÈRES SANITAIRES EN ELEVAGE
description: A practical guide explaining how to use serological monitoring with commercial ELISA kits to assess the effectiveness of farm biosecurity barriers in poultry operations. It outlines sampling, laboratory testing, and interpretation of seroprevalence results to recommend targeted biosecurity interventions and improve production efficiency.
